hero.name: Sebastián Huertas
hero.description: Passionate about building scalable web applications and solving complex problems with clean, efficient code.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm a Computer Science Engineering student at Universidad del Valle de Guatemala, passionate about full-stack development and cybersecurity. With hands-on experience across multiple tech stacks including React, Node.js, Laravel, and more, I enjoy building solutions that make a real impact.

items.description: Developed and maintained the anamnesis project using Laravel and PHP for frontend, backend, and API programming. Resolved frontend issues and gained basic Linux server management knowledge.
GPA above 90%. Focus on Web Technology, Software Engineering, Algorithms, Databases, and Cybersecurity. Currently advancing knowledge in React, Node.js, and database management.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects I've built across web development, APIs, and design.

items.title: Blog Anime
items.description: Full-stack blog built with React, Node.js, Vite, and JavaScript, featuring a robust API for seamless database connectivity.

items.title: Calculator
items.description: Next.js calculator app featuring responsive design and comprehensive unit testing for robust functionality.

items.title: Api Blog Anime
items.description: RESTful API built with Node.js, Express, Docker and Swagger, featuring robust database connectivity with MariaDB.

items.title: SmartYou
items.description: Figma prototype for a mobile app allowing SmartFit users to schedule gym sessions and avoid overcrowding, with a points reward system.
